decision.question: Route mutating git commands through a serialized wrapper so automation cannot collide on the shared repo index.
decision.chosen: Added a root-level git_serial wrapper and documented that mutating commands must run sequentially from the parent repo root.
decision.rationale: Parallel add/commit/push attempts created transient index lock failures that looked like filesystem corruption.

outcome.result: Derived steering backfill captured from the March 28 collaboration thread.
outcome.lesson: Automation should serialize writes explicitly instead of relying on operator timing.
outcome.follow_up: Use this correction family to weight future orchestration, frontend, and verifier decisions more heavily.
